title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo (v0.1.0) is a TypeScript CLI + Electron desktop code agent framework with a layered architecture: input routing → command dispatch / agent execution → LLM provider adapters → tool calls → SQLite persistence, using tsc for main process and Vite for renderer, tested with Vitest. Core modules include agent runtime, memory with semantic embeddings, desktop three‑layer IPC (main/preload/renderer), and a command dispatcher routing slash commands or plain text to agent.
